# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true

  Subnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    DependsOn: VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow inbound traffic on port 22 and 80
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DependsOn: SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-abc123
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      VpcSecurityGroupIds: [!Ref SecurityGroup]
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet

  EBSVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    DependsOn: EC2Instance
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Size: 30
      VolumeType: gp2

  EBSAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    DependsOn: EBSVolume
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance
      VolumeId: !Ref EBSVolume
      Device: /dev/sdh

Outputs:
  EC2PublicIP:
    Value: !GetAtt 'EC2Instance.PublicIp'
    Description: Public IP of the EC2 instance
